_comment: Copy to roi_coverage.json (gitignored). The Clock-A numerator the free feeds can't see: lab ARR run-rates + aggregate hyperscaler AI capex. degen.macro.roi_coverage() computes coverage (ARR/capex) and the honesty check (exogenous vs circular). Update arr_b/capex from prints (earnings, press); set circular_pct to your estimate of AI-internal/vendor-financed demand (NVDA->OpenAI->Azure->NVDA) that inflates ARR without anchoring it. token_volume is the optional Jevons numerator (any consistent index) — falling token price only helps if volume outruns it.
note: what the numbers say / what to refine next
